description: A direct model call answering an arithmetic question from weights alone — scripted to show the documented failure mode: multi-digit multiplication answered confidently and wrongly (127 × 49 is 6,223, not 6,213). Real-model behavior varies; the scheduled local experiment will record actual outcomes. Used by the flagship workflows-vs-agents lesson.

turns.teaching: No tools were offered and none exist. The model produced a fluent, confident, WRONG product — weights approximate arithmetic, they don't compute it. Nothing in this architecture can catch the error.
